title: Ploton
description: A mod for Minecraft which adds random weird and just fun stuff into Minecraft, like a block that lets you walk VERY fast...
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1dc44a16a448229a3cd301d8f0621c15c740432.png)
#          ~Mod Details~
### Always Download the latest version! Current Version: 5.4
**For Neoforge 1.21.4 and 1.21.8**

**For Fabric 1.21.8 [Always Download the latest bug fixes!!] (Early Beta)**

**For Forge 1.20.1 [Always Download the latest Verion!!]**


# -Updates!-
**Forge version of Ploton Has been released!**
**No major bugs yet, so Enjoy!**

# --Ploton Itself!--

**Ploton is a fun mod which adds a lot more blocks, ores, dimensions(6 right now). Its still in working and will get A LOT of bug fixes and featchers. Its adds More armour (over powered armour) and tools**

- :Ores:-
- 
- :Saphire- Adds a gem called saphire which can be mined with iron pickaxe and smelted to get a  saphire gem.
- :Ruby- Adds another gem called ruby which can be mined with iron pickaxe and smelted to get ruby  gem.
- :Zyinthium- adds a ingot called zynthium which can be mined with iron pickaxe and smelted ro get its ingot.
- 
- :Xelvium- Adds a Ingot called Xelvium, the BEST ingot in game as it needs diamend pickaxe and is very strong for armour.

- Brinthium- Adds a Ingot called Brinthium which which can be mined with an iron pickaxe. its around as good as saphire
- 
- Bloodvium- Adds a new Gem called bloodvium. Only located in a "Abandond Mansion" structure when you break the "Blood Covered Rose" 

AND MORE!!! I can't list all of them, its too much!


:Armour:-

- :Saphire armour is good and can be crafted with saphire gem,its a good armour better than iron.
- 
- :Ruby armour is worse than saphire but can be found early game and is still a good option.
- 
- :Zynthium armour is more of an not needed armour as its pretty bad but is rare and basicly a colectable.
- 
- :Xelvium armour is the best by far armour in Ploton and is better than netherite and is as rare as diamends and a pretty SOLID option, but now over-shadowed by the New Awakened SoulCrystal Armour from ploton 5.4!
- :Copper armour is also there! it just gives copper a use.
- Brinthium armour is a pretty good set of armour and is a good option for around early to mid-game.
- Bloodvium armour is ... bloodvium armour. Nothing much to say there.
- Amethyst armour is Crafted with amethyst shards and looks NICE. around diamond tier.

And again, still can't list them all!

All of the added ores have tools and again xelvium tools are the best overall, but ruby and saphire tools are good early game.

Weird and funny features are there for all the blocks including-

Saphire ore makes you walk a little faster but the full block turns you into the flash!
Ruby blocks are pretty slippery and make you slide fast!
Xelvium ore makes you jump 3-4 blocks higher but the full block makes you jump very high!(!FALL DAMAGE WARNING!)

Zynthium blocks make you go a little faster and jump a little higher, place them as you sprint and jump and your out of sight in a few seconds!


 -Dimensions-
The mod also adds a new dimension called Shadow (there will be 5 but as of now there is only 3 and you do need the speacial ingniter to make the first portal which can be crafted or traded with).

-  The First portal is made with saphire blocks placed like a nether portal.

- The Portal for Shadow 02 is made with zynthium blocks placed like a nether portal. the igniters can be crafted.

- The third one is made with xelvium blocks in a nether portal shape and ignited with its speacial igniter

The igniters can be crafted and crafting recipies unlocked through gameplay.

-Traders-
- Saphire trader- New villiger profesion called "saphire trader" which sells you GOOD
  loot. Profestion block: Saphire Block 
- Bloodvium Trader- Another profesion called "Bloodvium Trader". Profestion block: Bloodvium block

-Biomes-
1. DarkLands: The pretty dark biome which spawns the "Broken house" structure. has "Dark wood" wood and is a pretty cool biome.
2. Bloody Woods: a red-themed biome where LOTS of mobs spawn... dont die. 

-Structures-

Broken house: a small house with VERY good loot...
Abondend mansion: a big house with lots of Bloodvium in it... dont ask me where the bloodvium came from...



please enjoy it :)**
